title: Metal Access Panel - Picture Frame - Non Fire Rated - (150x150mm)
features: ▶ EASY TO FIT ◀ Draw around the provided pop-out template, cut your hole and place your panel. Flip the FlipFix device and drill until it clamps to the surround. It's that easy!
▶ SLEEK AESTHETICS ◀ Mitreless frame, flush lock and finished in a powder-coated RAL 9010 30% gloss white.
▶ 10 YEAR GUARANTEE ◀ FlipFix Access Panels are built in the UK from the highest quality zintec steel. We’re so confident in our panel that we provide a 10 YEAR GUARANTEE.
▶ NO EXTRA MATERIALS NEEDED ◀ All you need to fit our panel is a pencil, saw, spirit level and drill. No need for wood, glue or screws!
▶ SUITABLE FOR WALLS & CEILINGS ◀ Perfect for accessing plumbing, cables and piping around the home and workplace. Not suitable for external applications.
description: Product Description FlipFix's Premium Metal Access Panels offers a No Demolition route of access to many domestic services such as: Bathroom : back of faucets, under bath plumbing, shower mixing valves Kitchen : under sink plumbing, shut off valves, cooker hood ducting Living Area : concealed TV, network and telephone cables Gas & Electric : metres, security systems, junction boxes FlipFix is strong and durable despite being lightweight. Not recommended for external applications. Extremely Easy to Fit Mark and cut your hole Using the provided template, mark and cut your hole. Position your panel Place the panel inside - there's no need to remove the door. Drill into place With drill set to torque level 3, drill the FlipFix device until it firmly clamps to the surround. Best of Both Worlds Why buy plastic when you can get a premium product that's built to last a lifetime? FlipFix is easier to fit than plastics thanks to the provided Pop-Out Template and the unique FlipFix fitting device. Built to a high standard with quality zintec steel for longevity and durability. You won't get that with plastics. The FlipFix Fitting Device The device allows the panel to be secured to any surround with a depth ranging from 8mm to 32mm in both wall and ceiling applications. FlipFix is activated by turning the screw using a standard drill. The device then travels along the screw until it firmly clamps to the rear of the surround.
